message:
chore(ci): trigger Node.js CI on tests/ changes

Add tests/** to Node.js CI paths filter so zig-test job runs
when test files or fixtures are modified.

files.patch:
@@ -6,12 +6,14 @@ on:
     paths:
       - 'packages/node/**'
       - 'src/**'
+      - 'tests/**'
       - '.github/workflows/node-ci.yml'
   pull_request:
     branches: [main]
     paths:
       - 'packages/node/**'
       - 'src/**'
+      - 'tests/**'
       - '.github/workflows/node-ci.yml'
 
 jobs:
